properties.name: buttonProps
properties.description: Mantine Button props for the main export action

properties.name: downloadTooltipProps
properties.description: Tooltip wrapping the download button when applicable

properties.name: downloadButtonProps
properties.description: Mantine Button props for the download control

properties.name: buttonLabel
properties.description: When provided, hides the label header and uses this text as the button label.

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the export title text (Mantine `fw` prop).

name: NotificationWrapper
summary: Global notification styling driven by theme (`NotificationWrapper`).

properties.name: successColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for success notifications.

properties.name: warningColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for warning notifications.

properties.name: errorColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for error notifications.

properties.name: autoClose
properties.description:
Determines whether notification should be closed automatically,
number is auto close timeout in ms.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the loader

properties.name: size
properties.description: Size of the loader

properties.name: headerHeight
properties.description: Height of the header (responsive)

properties.name: navbarBreakpoint
properties.description: Breakpoint below which to hide the navigation bar

properties.name: navbarWidth
properties.description: Width of the navigation bar

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid columns

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid rows

properties.name: rightColumns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of columns for right container

properties.name: bottomRows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of rows for bottom container

properties.name: bottomFullWidth
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Shall the bottom container use the full width?

properties.name: navbarBorder
properties.description: Should the navbar have a border

properties.name: headerBorder
properties.description: Should the header have a border

properties.name: rightBorder
properties.description: Should the right container area have a border

properties.name: keepBottomInGrid
properties.description:
Should the bottom container be shown at the bottom of the grid even below the navbarBreakpoint?
If false, the bottom container is shown as part of the navigation bar area below the navbarBreakpoint.
In that case, the right container moves to the bottom of the grid layout in portrait mode.

properties.name: bgTop
properties.description: Top background color

properties.name: bgLeft
properties.description: Left background color

properties.name: bgRight
properties.description: Right background color

properties.name: bgBottom
properties.description: Bottom background color

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Number of grid columns

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Number of grid rows

properties.name: leftColumns
properties.description: Number of columns for left container

properties.name: rightColumns
properties.description: Number of columns for right container

properties.name: topRows
properties.description: Number of rows for top container

properties.name: bottomRows
properties.description: Number of rows for bottom container

properties.name: topFullWidth
properties.description: Shall the top container use the full width?

properties.name: bottomFullWidth
properties.description: Shall the bottom container use the full width?

properties.name: w
properties.description: Group width

properties.name: h
properties.description: Group height

properties.name: justify
properties.description: Flex justify-content

properties.name: wrap
properties.description: Flex wrap

properties.name: p
properties.description: Padding (Mantine spacing)

properties.name: template
properties.description: Layout template key to render

properties.name: showContainerButtons
properties.description: Show UI buttons for toggling template containers (top/left/right/bottom)

properties.name: p
properties.description: Stack padding

properties.name: containerGroupProps
properties.description: Container group props

properties.name: groupProps
properties.description: Group props

properties.name: iconProps
properties.description: Icon color

properties.name: textProps
properties.description: Text props

properties.name: buttonProps
properties.description: Button props
properties.type: ButtonProps & ComponentProp<"a"> & Omit<Omit<DetailedHTMLProps<AnchorHTMLAttributes<HTMLAnchorElement>, HTMLAnchorElement>, "ref">, "component"> & { ref?: ((instance: HTMLAnchorElement | null) => void) | RefObject<HTMLAnchorElement> | null; renderRoot?: (props: any) => any }

name: Icon
summary: AppBuilder icon props (Iconify + theme defaults via `useProps("Icon", …)`).

properties.name: size
properties.description: Mantine size token or CSS length.

properties.name: id
properties.description:
Unique identifier for the icon

Used as base for generating unique IDs for SVG elements and shapes.
Ensures consistent IDs for server-side rendering and accessibility.

properties.name: ref
properties.description:
Allows getting a ref to the component instance.
Once the component unmounts, React will set `ref.current` to `null`
(or call the ref with `null` if you passed a callback ref).

properties.name: color
properties.description:
Icon color (for monotone icons only)

Only affects monotone icons. Icons with hardcoded palettes (like emoji)
cannot be recolored. Accepts any valid CSS color value.

properties.name: aria-activedescendant
properties.description: Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox, group, or application.

properties.name: aria-atomic
properties.description: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.

properties.name: aria-autocomplete
properties.description:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.

properties.name: aria-braillelabel
properties.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element, which is intended to be converted into Braille.

properties.name: aria-brailleroledescription
properties.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized abbreviated description for the role of an element, which is intended to be converted into Braille.

properties.name: aria-checked
properties.description: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.

properties.name: aria-colcount
properties.description: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-colindex
properties.description: Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-colindextext
properties.description: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-colindex.

properties.name: aria-colspan
properties.description: Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-controls
properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current element.

properties.name: aria-current
properties.description: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.

properties.name: aria-describedby
properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

properties.name: aria-description
properties.description: Defines a string value that describes or annotates the current element.

properties.name: aria-details
properties.description: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.

properties.name: aria-disabled
properties.description: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.

properties.name: aria-dropeffect
properties.description: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.

properties.name: aria-errormessage
properties.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

properties.name: aria-expanded
properties.description: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.

properties.name: aria-flowto
properties.description:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at the user's discretion,
allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading in document source order.

properties.name: aria-grabbed
properties.description: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.

properties.name: aria-haspopup
properties.description: Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog, that can be triggered by an element.

properties.name: aria-hidden
properties.description: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.

properties.name: aria-invalid
properties.description: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.

properties.name: aria-keyshortcuts
properties.description: Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an element.

properties.name: aria-label
properties.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

properties.name: aria-labelledby
properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

properties.name: aria-level
properties.description: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.

properties.name: aria-live
properties.description: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.

properties.name: aria-modal
properties.description: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.

properties.name: aria-multiline
properties.description: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.

properties.name: aria-multiselectable
properties.description: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.

properties.name: aria-orientation
properties.description: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.

properties.name: aria-owns
properties.description:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.

properties.name: aria-placeholder
properties.description:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.

properties.name: aria-posinset
properties.description: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

properties.name: aria-pressed
properties.description: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.

properties.name: aria-readonly
properties.description: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.

properties.name: aria-relevant
properties.description: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.
properties.type: "text" | "all" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals"

properties.name: aria-required
properties.description: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.

properties.name: aria-roledescription
properties.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.

properties.name: aria-rowcount
properties.description: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-rowindex
properties.description: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-rowindextext
properties.description: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-rowindex.

properties.name: aria-rowspan
properties.description: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: aria-selected
properties.description: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.

properties.name: aria-setsize
properties.description: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

properties.name: aria-sort
properties.description: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.

properties.name: aria-valuemax
properties.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.

properties.name: aria-valuemin
properties.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.

properties.name: aria-valuenow
properties.description: Defines the current value for a range widget.

properties.name: aria-valuetext
properties.description: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.

properties.name: onLoad
properties.description:
Callback fired when icon data is loaded

Only triggered for icons loaded from the Iconify API. Not called
for icons that are already available or provided as objects.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: Rendering mode for the icon

properties.name: rotate
properties.description:
Rotation angle for the icon

Can be specified as:
- String with units: "90deg", "0.5turn", "1.5708rad"
- Number representing quarter-turns: 0=0°, 1=90°, 2=180°, 3=270°
properties.example:
x
<Icon icon="bi:check2-circle" /> // No rotation
<Icon icon="bi:check2-circle" rotate="90deg" /> // 90° clockwise
<Icon icon="bi:check2-circle" rotate={2} /> // 180° rotation
<Icon icon="bi:check2-circle" rotate="0.5turn" /> // 180° rotation

properties.name: flip
properties.description:
Flip transformation shorthand

Convenient way to flip icons horizontally and/or vertically.

properties.name: ssr
properties.description:
Server-side rendering mode

When `true`, icon renders immediately without waiting for component
to mount. Useful for server-side rendering to prevent hydration issues.

properties.name: fallback
properties.description:
Fallback content while icon is loading or failed to load

Displayed before the icon is loaded and rendered. If not provided,
an empty span will be rendered as placeholder.

properties.name: inline
properties.description:
Display mode for the icon

When `true`, the icon is displayed as an inline element with baseline
vertical alignment. When `false`, it's displayed as a block element
with middle vertical alignment.
properties.example:
x
<Icon icon="mdi:home" inline /> // Aligns with text baseline
<Icon icon="mdi:home" /> // Centers vertically

properties.name: anchorTarget
properties.description: Target for markdown links.

name: TooltipWrapper
summary: Custom tooltip wrapper props merged with Mantine `TooltipProps` via `useProps`.

properties.name: withArrow
properties.description: Show tooltip arrow (standard Mantine Tooltip).
